escalate: Esc inquiries about items not on the site
ESC if the cx missed a sale & wants to take advantage of it
ESC if the customer is asking for a discount and we don't have one
If cx is looking for general recommendations use LFR shortcut and ESC
templates: If cx is building a new home, interested in refurnishing their entire home or rooms in their home, use the IDS shortcut
If cx is shopping for a client use SFC shortcut
Any convo without a positive outcome (out of stock, not on sale, not shipping in time), use DSS shortcut
dos_and_donts: For product-specific delivery time-frame inquiries always check the product page for delivery info and share that with the cx

Hi Sarah. I had a welcome code but it would not apply to this order last night when I was trying to place the order? I looked at the vendors on your website and did not see that this brand was excluded from promotions. Do you know why it would not have taken the code? This will be my first order with your site.

Kathy Kuo: Sorry to hear that! We have quite a few vendors that don't participate in any of our sales so our codes won't work on their items. Our codes also won't work if an item is already discounted as discounts may not overlap. Mind sending a screenshot of your cart, please? Happy to check on this for you.
Template used: "Why doesn't my discount work on some items?"; last updated: 2022-10-18 00:34:34.308

Kathy Kuo: Thanks for the screenshot! We actually have quite a few vendors that don't participate in any of our sales so our codes won't work on their items. Our codes also won't work if an item is already discounted as discounts may not overlap. I hope this clarifies! Let me know if you have any more questions.
